notebooks.title: Time Value of Money
notebooks.summary: Present value, future value, NPV and IRR from first principles — the math behind every valuation, using only the Python standard library.

notebooks.title: Financial Statement Ratios
notebooks.summary: Turn an income statement and balance sheet into liquidity, profitability and leverage ratios with a tidy pandas DataFrame.

notebooks.title: Inflation & Real Returns
notebooks.summary: Read a CPI series, compute inflation, and learn why nominal returns lie — real vs nominal and the Rule of 72.

notebooks.title: Yield Curve & Recession Signal
notebooks.summary: Build a Treasury yield curve, interpolate missing tenors with numpy, and detect the 10y-2y inversion that precedes recessions.

notebooks.title: Your First Watchlist & Returns
notebooks.summary: Build a watchlist, compute daily returns and volatility, and rank winners and losers — pure standard library.

notebooks.title: Moving Average Crossover Backtest
notebooks.summary: Backtest a fast/slow SMA crossover strategy on a price series, build the equity curve, and measure return, drawdown and Sharpe.

notebooks.title: Dollar-Cost Averaging Simulator
notebooks.summary: Simulate dollar-cost averaging vs a lump-sum investment over a volatile market and see which wins and why.

notebooks.title: Dividend Growth & DRIP Compounding
notebooks.summary: Model a dividend reinvestment plan (DRIP) with growing dividends and watch compounding snowball over decades with pandas.

notebooks.title: Portfolio Weights & Returns
notebooks.summary: Allocate weights across assets, compute the weighted portfolio return, and see how drift forces rebalancing.

notebooks.title: Mean-Variance Optimization
notebooks.summary: Build the efficient frontier: covariance, thousands of simulated portfolios with numpy, and the max-Sharpe and min-volatility picks.

notebooks.title: Monte Carlo Price Simulation
notebooks.summary: Simulate thousands of Geometric Brownian Motion price paths with numpy, build a percentile cone, and estimate Value at Risk.

notebooks.title: Pairs Trading: Spread Z-Score
notebooks.summary: Estimate a hedge ratio by least squares, build the spread z-score, and generate mean-reversion entry/exit signals with a simple P&L.
